projects.name: Solar + Energy Storage on Garage
projects.description: Install 5-7 solar panels on south-facing garage roof face (20x12 ft, ~2-2.8 kW) plus battery storage. Solar = standalone ROI investment (~5yr payback at $0.42/kWh). Battery = generator alternative (no lot space for generator). 30% federal ITC applies to both when paired.
projects.notes: DESIGN: South garage face only. 5 portrait panels = 2.0 kW; 7 mixed = 2.8 kW. ~3,200-4,500 kWh/yr production (20-26% offset). All-in after ITC: solar ~$9-10k, battery ~$9-10k. VENDORS: Sunergy (sunergy.com) — EnergySage 2026 CA Installer of Year, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door. NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com) — Diamond Certified, 35yr, San Mateo County, 40yr warranty. Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy) — online only. AVOID: Sunrun.

tasks.title: Analyze energy usage and size system
tasks.notes: 17,178 kWh/yr at $0.42/kWh avg. Target: 5-7 panels south garage face (20x12 ft) = 2-2.8 kW. ~5yr payback after ITC.

tasks.title: Research and shortlist solar installers
tasks.notes: Shortlist: Sunergy (sunergy.com, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door), NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com, Diamond Certified, San Mateo County), Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy, online only). Avoid Sunrun.

tasks.title: Contact installers for quotes
tasks.notes: Spec: south garage face (20x12 ft, 5-7 panels, ~2-2.8 kW), paired battery (Enphase IQ or Powerwall 3), detached garage sub-panel interconnect. Ask each for: $/W, panel brand, inverter type, battery spec, warranty, timeline, ITC total. Request free shade/LIDAR analysis.

tasks.title: Compare quotes and select installer
tasks.notes: Prefer Enphase microinverters over string inverter. Compare $/W, battery spec, warranty, timeline. 30% ITC on full system incl. battery.

tasks.title: Confirm ITC timing — credit files in year PTO is granted
tasks.notes: 30% federal ITC on Form 5695. Claimed in tax year Permission to Operate granted by PG&E. Battery qualifies only when solar-paired. Plan install timing accordingly.

needs_attention.title: Contact installers for quotes

maintenance.name: Air Filter — Downstairs HVAC
maintenance.notes: Filter size: 13.5 × 29.5 × 1 inch (Merv 11 or 13 recommended). Two HVAC systems — this is downstairs unit.

maintenance.name: Air Filter — Upstairs HVAC
maintenance.notes: Filter size: 16 × 24 × 1 inch. Upstairs HVAC unit.

maintenance.name: LG Washer/Dryer
maintenance.notes: LG washer/dryer combo. Installed 2019. Expected lifespan ~10-13 yrs. Annual cleaning/maintenance check.

maintenance.name: Thermador Refrigerator
maintenance.notes: Thermador refrigerator. New 2025. Check condenser coils annually. Warranty: typically 2yr full, 5yr sealed system.

maintenance.name: Wolf Range
maintenance.notes: Wolf range. New 2025. Annual burner and igniter check. Wolf warranty: 2yr parts & labor.

maintenance.name: Thermador Dishwasher
maintenance.notes: Thermador dishwasher. New 2025. Clean filter every 6 months. Warranty: typically 2yr.

observations.summary: The entryway is empty and quiet during the early morning hours. No movement or activity is observed in the foyer.
The backyard and side passage are empty and quiet during the early morning hours. The white gate remains closed, blocking the path between the house and the driveway.
The side yard dog run is empty and quiet during the early morning hours. The gate is closed and no dogs or people are visible in the area.
The covered patio is dark and empty during the early morning hours. No movement or activity is visible in the scene.

The front yard camera is experiencing a technical error, intermittently displaying a message that no frames are being received. When the feed is active, Roxanne's black Porsche Cayenne is parked in the driveway, and a blue car is visible on the street.

insights.summary: Synchronized unclassified audio across all outdoor sensors, combined with 18 active mobile devices inside and the car remaining parked, confirms the outdoor activity is weather-related rather than a visitor. This context clarifies the flagged audio spikes and camera errors as likely environmental interference, preventing unnecessary security alerts.
[front_yard] The camera feed is experiencing a technical error and is not providing continuous monitoring.
[front_yard] The front yard camera has stopped receiving frames, indicating a technical error or connection issue.

The synchronized unclassified audio across all outdoor sensors, combined with concurrent camera stream instability and explicit wind/weather noise classifications, confirms a localized weather event (likely heavy wind or rain) is causing system artifacts rather than human activity or a security threat. This explains the false triggers and camera glitches, indicating the household is secure and no immediate action is required.
[front_yard] The camera feed is displaying an error message: 'No frames have been received, check error logs'.

Synchronized unclassified audio across all outdoor sensors, combined with the doorbell's classification as wind/weather noise and concurrent camera instability, indicates a developing weather event rather than a security threat, explaining the dogs' restlessness and false triggers. Steve should monitor for potential weather impacts on the property and drainage.
[dog_run] A camera error was detected in one of the frames, indicating a momentary loss of video stream.

The synchronized outdoor audio spikes, repeated doorbell triggers, and concurrent camera instability between 1:12–1:23 AM strongly indicate severe weather or environmental interference rather than human activity, especially since 16–17 connected devices confirm the household is indoors and asleep; monitor for network drops but no security threat is indicated.

The synchronized unclassified audio across multiple outdoor sensors, combined with a doorbell trigger at 00:10 and the dogs' alert behavior, indicates a late-night visitor or delivery at the front door. With 17 devices still home, the family is present, but the timing just past midnight warrants a quick check to confirm if it was expected.
[front_yard] The camera stream is unstable, showing error messages.
